title: KEV
description: KEV schema from Asset Graph API

date_added.description: The date the vulnerability was added to the KEV catalog.

date_due.description: Per CISA’s Binding Operation Directive 22-01, the date all federal civilian executive branch (FCEB) agencies are required to remediate vulnerabilities in the KEV catalog.

source.description: The source checked to determine whether the CVE is in the KEV catalog.
